---
title: PIHNA 2D Sim
format:
    html: 
        toc: true
        lightbox: true
        code-overflow: wrap
---

```{python}
#Import Packages
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import scipy
import nilearn
from tqdm import tqdm
from nilearn import plotting
from nilearn import image
import os
import nibabel as nib
from matplotlib.colors import Normalize, ListedColormap
from matplotlib import colormaps
from matplotlib import animation

from PIHNA_2d.set_interfaces import set_interfaces
from PIHNA_2d.numerics_2d import numerics_2d, numerical_jacobian_jit

from numba import jit
```

```{python}
os.chdir('C:/Users/pmxcb7/OneDrive - The University of Nottingham/Recurrence in GBM/GLISTR')
#Loading in probabilistic atlas and plotting maps
CSF=image.smooth_img('IIT_CSF_tissue_prob.nii.gz',fwhm=3)
WM=image.smooth_img('IIT_WM_tissue_prob.nii.gz',fwhm=3)
GM=image.smooth_img('IIT_GM_tissue_prob.nii.gz',fwhm=3)
nilearn.plotting.plot_prob_atlas((CSF,WM,GM),title='IIT Atlas',colorbar=True)
#Loading probabilistic maps,finding outside the brain and defining slice 
CSF_load=nib.load('IIT_CSF_tissue_prob.nii.gz').get_fdata()
WM_load=nib.load('IIT_WM_tissue_prob.nii.gz').get_fdata()
GM_load=nib.load('IIT_GM_tissue_prob.nii.gz').get_fdata()
outside_brain=np.zeros((CSF_load.shape))
for i in range(outside_brain.shape[0]):
    for j in range(outside_brain.shape[1]):
        for k in range(outside_brain.shape[2]):
            if CSF_load[i,j,k]+WM_load[i,j,k]+GM_load[i,j,k]==0:
                outside_brain[i,j,k]=1
slice_no=100
CSF_slice=CSF_load[:,:,slice_no]
WM_slice=WM_load[:,:,slice_no]
GM_slice=GM_load[:,:,slice_no]
OB_slice=outside_brain[:,:,slice_no]
#plotting slices of probibablistic maps
fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['CSF','WM','GM','OB']],layout='constrained')
axs['CSF'].imshow(CSF_slice)
axs['WM'].imshow(WM_slice)
axs['GM'].imshow(GM_slice)
axs['OB'].imshow(OB_slice)
plt.show()
```

```{python}
slice_atlas=np.zeros((CSF_slice.shape[0],CSF_slice.shape[1]))
for i in range(slice_atlas.shape[0]):
    for j in range(slice_atlas.shape[1]):
        if OB_slice[i,j]==0:
            slice_atlas[i,j]=np.argmax(np.array([WM_slice[i,j],GM_slice[i,j],CSF_slice[i,j]]))
        else: 
            slice_atlas[i,j]=2
Slice=slice_atlas
```

```{python}
P={'R_wg':10,
    'dt':0.05,
    'dx':0.01,
    'D_c':1e-5,
    'D_h_mul':1,
    'rho':1e-1,
    'beta_mul':0.5,
    'gamma':0.05,
    'alpha_h_mul':0.1,
    'alpha_n':np.log(2)/5,
    'D_v':0.18,
    'D_a':3.15,
    'delta_c':2.77e-13,
    'delta_h':5.22e-10,
    'mu':np.log(2)*365/15,
    'q':1.66,
    'lam':15.6*365,
    'K':1,
    'Km':1,
    'P_cw':2,
    'P_hw':2,
    'P_cg':1,
    'P_hg':1,
    'v0':0.03,
    'u0':1
}
```

```{python}
Dweight1,Dweight2,Origin1,Origin2,Terminus1,Terminus2,ind_nz,boundary=set_interfaces(Slice,P)
```

```{python}
cmap_bg=ListedColormap(['white','grey','lightblue','black'])
n1,n2=Slice.shape
o1i=np.unravel_index(Origin1,(n1,n2),'F')
t1i=np.unravel_index(Terminus1,(n1,n2),'F')
plt.pcolormesh(Slice,edgecolors='gray',linewidth=0.5,vmin=0,vmax=3,cmap=cmap_bg)
plt.plot(o1i[1]+0.5,o1i[0]+0.5,'or')
plt.plot(t1i[1]+0.5,t1i[0]+0.5,'xk')
plt.gca().invert_yaxis()
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c0=np.zeros_like(Slice)
v0=np.zeros_like(Slice)
x=np.linspace(0,Slice.shape[0],Slice.shape[0])
y=np.linspace(0,Slice.shape[1],Slice.shape[1])
for i in range(Slice.shape[0]):
    for j in range(Slice.shape[1]):
        c0[i,j]=0.4*np.exp(-((x[i]-125)**2+(y[j]-90)**2)/5**2)
        if Slice[i,j]<2:
            v0[i,j]=0.03
        #if (x[i]-75)**2+(y[j]-100)**2<81:
            #c0[i,j]=1 
        #else: 
            #c0[i,j]=0
IC={
    'c0': c0,
    'h0': np.zeros_like(Slice,dtype=np.float64),
    'n0': np.zeros_like(Slice,dtype=np.float64),
    'v0': v0,
    'a0': np.zeros_like(Slice,dtype=np.float64)
}
```

```{python}
n1=Slice.shape[0]
n2=Slice.shape[1]
Simdata = numerics_2d(
    Dweight1, Dweight2,
    Origin1, Origin2,
    Terminus1, Terminus2,
    n1, n2, ind_nz, boundary,
    IC, dayspersave=1, t_finish=365,
    radiussave=0.1, radius_final=1.0,
    P=P)
```

```{python}
c=Simdata['c']
h=Simdata['h']
n=Simdata['n']
v=Simdata['v']
a=Simdata['a']
rad1=Simdata['rad1']
rad2=Simdata['rad2']
```

```{python}
np.savetxt('C:/Users/pmxcb7/OneDrive - The University of Nottingham/PIHNA/c.csv',c)
np.savetxt('C:/Users/pmxcb7/OneDrive - The University of Nottingham/PIHNA/h.csv',h)
np.savetxt('C:/Users/pmxcb7/OneDrive - The University of Nottingham/PIHNA/n.csv',n)
```

```{python}
c_df=pd.DataFrame(c)
c_df.to_csv('C:/Users/pmxcb7/OneDrive - The University of Nottingham/PIHNA/c.csv',header=None)
h_df=pd.DataFrame(h)
h_df.to_csv('C:/Users/pmxcb7/OneDrive - The University of Nottingham/PIHNA/h.csv',header=None)
n_df=pd.DataFrame(n)
n_df.to_csv('C:/Users/pmxcb7/OneDrive - The University of Nottingham/PIHNA/n.csv',header=None)
v_df=pd.DataFrame(v)
v_df.to_csv('C:/Users/pmxcb7/OneDrive - The University of Nottingham/PIHNA/v.csv',header=None)
```

```{python}
plt.plot(rad1,color='b')
plt.plot(rad2,color='red')
plt.ylabel('FLAIR')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c_re,h_re,n_re,v_re,a_re=[],[],[],[],[]
for i in range(c.shape[0]):
    c_re.append(c[i].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
    h_re.append(h[i].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
    n_re.append(n[i].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
    v_re.append(v[i].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
    a_re.append(a[i].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
```

```{python}
cmap_green=colormaps['Greens']
cmap_orange=colormaps['Oranges']
cmap_red=colormaps['Reds']
cmap_blue=colormaps['Blues']
```

```{python}
fig,ax=plt.subplots()
ax1=ax.twinx()
for i in range(c.shape[0]):
    ax.plot(c_re[i][125,:],color=cmap_green(i/c.shape[0]))
ax1.plot(Slice[125,:])
fig.suptitle('c')
plt.show()

for i in range(h.shape[0]):
    plt.plot(h_re[i][125,:],color=cmap_orange(i/c.shape[0]))
plt.title('h')
plt.show()

for i in range(n.shape[0]):
    plt.plot(n_re[i][125,:],color=cmap_red(i/c.shape[0]))
plt.title('n')
plt.show()

for i in range(v.shape[0]):
    plt.plot(v_re[i][125,:],color=cmap_blue(i/c.shape[0]))
plt.title('v')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['c','h','n'],['a','v','r']],layout='constrained')
axs['c'].imshow(c[0].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
axs['h'].imshow(h[0].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
axs['n'].imshow(n[0].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
axs['a'].imshow(a[0].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
axs['v'].imshow(v[0].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))

axs['r'].set_axis_off()

axs['c'].set_title('c')
axs['h'].set_title('h')
axs['n'].set_title('n')
axs['a'].set_title('a')
axs['v'].set_title('v')

plt.show()
```

```{python}
fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['c','h','n'],['a','v','r']],layout='constrained')
axs['c'].imshow(c[int(c.shape[0]/2)].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
axs['h'].imshow(h[int(c.shape[0]/2)].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
axs['n'].imshow(n[int(c.shape[0]/2)].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
axs['a'].imshow(a[int(c.shape[0]/2)].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
axs['v'].imshow(v[int(c.shape[0]/2)].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))

axs['r'].set_axis_off()

axs['c'].set_title('c')
axs['h'].set_title('h')
axs['n'].set_title('n')
axs['a'].set_title('a')
axs['v'].set_title('v')

plt.show()
```

```{python}
fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['c','h','n'],['a','v','r']],layout='constrained')
axs['c'].imshow(c[-1].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
axs['h'].imshow(h[-1].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
axs['n'].imshow(n[-1].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
axs['a'].imshow(a[-1].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))
axs['v'].imshow(v[-1].reshape((n1,n2),order='F'))

axs['r'].set_axis_off()

axs['c'].set_title('c')
axs['h'].set_title('h')
axs['n'].set_title('n')
axs['a'].set_title('a')
axs['v'].set_title('v')

plt.show()
```

```{python}
fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['Norm','Hyp'],['Necr','Vasc']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,10))

axs['Norm'].set_title('Normoxic Cells',fontsize=20)
axs['Norm'].set(xticks=[],yticks=[])
axs['Hyp'].set_title('Hypoxic Cells',fontsize=20)
axs['Hyp'].set(xticks=[],yticks=[])
axs['Necr'].set_title('Necrotic Cells',fontsize=20)
axs['Necr'].set(xticks=[],yticks=[])

ims=[]
for i in range(c.shape[0]):
    im_norm=axs['Norm'].pcolormesh(c[i].reshape((n1,n2),order='F').T,cmap=cmap_green,animated=True)
    im_hyp=axs['Hyp'].pcolormesh(h[i].reshape((n1,n2),order='F').T,cmap=cmap_orange,animated=True)
    im_necr=axs['Necr'].pcolormesh(n[i].reshape((n1,n2),order='F').T,cmap=cmap_red,animated=True)
    im_vasc=axs['Vasc'].pcolormesh(v[i].reshape((n1,n2),order='F').T,cmap=cmap_blue,animated=True)
    ims.append([im_norm,im_hyp,im_necr])

axs['Norm'].pcolormesh(Slice.T,cmap=cmap_bg,alpha=0.5)
axs['Hyp'].pcolormesh(Slice.T,cmap=cmap_bg,alpha=0.5)
axs['Necr'].pcolormesh(Slice.T,cmap=cmap_bg,alpha=0.5)

axs['Vasc'].set_axis_off()

anim=animation.ArtistAnimation(fig,ims,blit=True)
anim.save('C:/Users/pmxcb7/OneDrive - The University of Nottingham/PIHNA/pihna.mp4')

plt.show()
```
